response.justification: While the candidate is a highly experienced software engineer with a strong background in full-stack web development and DevOps, they lack almost all of the core requirements for this embedded networking role. They do not possess the required native-level Japanese proficiency, have very limited C programming experience, and show no background in Linux kernel modification or embedded L2/L3 networking security technologies.
strengths: Extensive software development experience (15+ years) across web, mobile, and desktop platforms.
Strong background in DevOps, Linux environments, Docker, and CI/CD pipelines.
Proven track record of technical leadership, open-source contribution, and mentoring.
concerns: Does not meet the mandatory requirement for native-level Japanese language proficiency.
Lacks recent and extensive C programming experience for UNIX/Linux software development.
No demonstrated experience in embedded networking, specific security protocols (802.1X, MACsec), or Linux kernel source-code modification.
